phase_summary.phase: P8 Ask matter, cohorts, replay, experiments, flags
P4 spaces, all content, search, resource surfaces
P5 matter profiles, event stream, raw evidence
P9 settings, team, billing, profile, notifications
P10 dark theme and preference parity

evidence_policy: This ledger is conservative: representative_verified means a phase-level surface has screenshot evidence; it does not mean every individual screenshot in that phase is pixel-verified.
